item.title: [Dimension 20] Bouts and Boogies
item.description:
Fresh from match one, the wrestlers encounter Big Z himself and prepare to face down Nature's Wrath.

Duration: 1:47:06

Tags: Dimension 20, Titan Takedown, dungeons and dragons, role playing, RPG, tabletop rpg, bloodsport, hercules, mythology, magic, the gods, mythical creatures, royalty, heroes, wrestling, partying, over the top, xavier woods, austin creed, kofi kingston, bayley, chelsea green, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: [Dimension 20] Dimension 20: Cloudward, Ho! Teaser
item.description:
New season premieres June 4th.

Duration: 00:38

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: [Dimension 20] A Bird in the Hand
item.description:
As the popularity of the Party Animals grows, the forces that oppose them start fighting dirty.

Duration: 2:12:25

item.title: [Dimension 20] Hope and Heroism
item.description:
The Righteous Wrestlers clash in the final match for the seat on Olympus.

Duration: 2:10:49
